en.auth.name: Name
en.overview.heroTitle: Upload any file, and MyReader will intelligently answer your questions in seconds
en.overview.howItWorksTitle: How to Use MyReader AI (Chat with Files and More)
en.overview.pricingTitle: Read smarter without losing your time
en.overview.ctaTitle: Get your first read for free!
en.overview.ctaText: Ready to save your time and read smarter? Sign up free today and feel the difference in minutes.
en.overview.form.name: Full Name
en.overview.form.source: Where did you hear from us?
en.dashboard.noReviews: No reviews yet. Once you start using MyReader, your recent activity will appear here.
en.dashboard.noChats: No chats yet. Start a chat from the Chat page.
en.chat.welcomeText: Please upload a file to start a new chat. MyReader can process documents and help you analyze and discuss their content.
en.chat.uploadTitle: Upload a file to start chatting
en.chat.uploadHint: Drag and drop your file here or click to browse
en.chat.folderUploadHint: Enterprise users can upload a local folder and ask questions across all of its documents.
en.chat.folderUpgradeHint: Upgrade to Enterprise to upload entire folders and chat with grouped documents.
en.chat.composerNote: Answers will be grounded in your uploaded document.
en.chat.composerNoteFolder: Answers will be grounded only in the selected folder documents.
en.chat.composerPlaceholderDisabled: Upload a file to start asking questions...
en.chat.composerPlaceholderReady: Ask anything about the uploaded document...
en.chat.composerPlaceholderFolder: Ask anything about the uploaded folder...
en.chat.currentScopeEmpty: Open a chat to see the document or folder contents here.
en.chat.processedFileIntro: I have processed your file "{{fileName}}". What would you like to know about it?
en.chat.processedFolderIntro: Your folder "{{folderName}}" is ready. Ask me questions and I will answer only from the uploaded documents in this folder.
en.chat.previousUploadIntro: You previously uploaded a file named "{{fileName}}".
en.chat.previousFolderIntro: You previously uploaded the folder "{{folderName}}". Open the document list on the right to review everything inside it.
en.chat.uploadWarning: This file was uploaded, but RAG processing did not finish successfully. Please try another file or re-upload this one.
en.chat.uploadFailed: File upload failed. Please try again.
en.chat.folderUploadFailed: Folder upload failed. Please try again or upload fewer files at once.
en.chat.folderUploadPartial: Folder uploaded with {{ready}} ready documents out of {{total}} files. Some files still need attention.
en.chat.folderUploadNoReady: The folder upload finished, but none of the files are ready for chat yet.
en.chat.folderEnterpriseOnly: Folder upload is available on the Enterprise plan.
en.chat.settingsAlert: Use the header controls to switch theme or language. The guided tour can walk you through the rest of the workspace.
en.chat.helpAlert: Use the tour for a step-by-step guide: upload a file, open a chat, ask questions, and review your history from the side panels.
en.sentbot.title: Sentbot
en.sentbot.intro.line2: I can help with support, usage, dashboard stats, subscriptions, and billing.
en.sentbot.intro.line3: For document-content questions, please use the Chat page.
en.sentbot.placeholder: Ask about usage, plans, billing, or dashboard info...
en.sentbot.prompt.queries: How many queries have I used today?
en.sentbot.prompt.uploads: How many uploads do I have in my account?
en.sentbot.prompt.chatCounts: Show my chat and message totals.
en.sentbot.prompt.plan: What plan am I on right now?
en.sentbot.prompt.upgrade: How can I upgrade to Enterprise?
en.sentbot.prompt.usersByTier: How many users are on each tier?
en.sentbot.prompt.features: What can MyReader help me do?
en.tour.common.controls.title: Your workspace controls
en.tour.common.controls.description: Use these controls on every page to switch language, change theme, and replay the tour.
en.tour.overview.hero.title: Start here before you sign in
en.tour.overview.hero.description: The homepage introduces MyReader and shows new visitors where to begin with the free trial.
en.tour.overview.how.title: See the step-by-step flow
en.tour.overview.how.description: This section explains the usual path: create an account, upload documents, and start chatting with them.
en.tour.overview.pricing.title: Check the plans
en.tour.overview.pricing.description: Compare Free, Premium, and Enterprise to decide how much upload and chat capacity you need.
en.tour.overview.cta.title: Create your account
en.tour.overview.cta.description: The sign-up area is the fastest way for a new user to move from browsing into uploading and chatting.
en.tour.login.form.title: Log in to continue
en.tour.login.form.description: Enter your email and password here to open your private dashboard and chat workspace.
en.tour.login.alt.title: Need an account first?
en.tour.login.alt.description: Use the sign-up link below the form if you have not created your account yet.
en.tour.signup.form.title: Create your account
en.tour.signup.form.description: Fill in your basic details here so you can start uploading files and using RAG chat.
en.tour.signup.alt.title: Already registered?
en.tour.signup.alt.description: If you already have an account, the login link takes you back to the sign-in form.
en.tour.dashboard.summary.title: Your key numbers
en.tour.dashboard.summary.description: After login, the dashboard highlights document uploads, chats, reviews, and plan-level activity.
en.tour.dashboard.reviews.title: Recent activity
en.tour.dashboard.reviews.description: This table shows your latest reviews and helps you keep track of ongoing document work.
en.tour.dashboard.chats.title: Jump back into chats
en.tour.dashboard.chats.description: Your recent chats appear here so you can return to ongoing conversations quickly.
en.tour.chat.sidebar.title: Your chat list
en.tour.chat.sidebar.description: Use the left sidebar to start fresh chats and reopen previous conversations.
en.tour.chat.upload.title: Upload files or folders
en.tour.chat.upload.description: Upload a single file here, or upload a full folder if you are on Enterprise, before asking document-grounded questions.
en.tour.chat.composer.title: Ask grounded questions
en.tour.chat.composer.description: Once processing finishes, ask questions here and MyReader will answer only from the uploaded scope.
en.tour.chat.history.title: Review uploads and topics
en.tour.chat.history.description: The right sidebar keeps your upload history, conversation topics, and the active document list together.
en.tour.chat.sentbot.title: Open Sentbot support
en.tour.chat.sentbot.description: Sentbot helps with usage, billing, plans, and product support. For document content, stay in the Chat page.
en.pricing.title: Read smarter without losing your time
en.pricing.free.name: Free
en.pricing.starter.name: Starter
en.pricing.enterprise.name: Enterprise
en.pricing.enterprise.f4: Contact us for a personalized demo
en.pricing.details: All plans are fast, secure, and ad-free. Cancel anytime with one click.
en.pricing.stripeNote: Paid subscriptions are processed securely with Stripe checkout.
en.pricing.feat1.title: Save Your Time!
en.pricing.feat1.l1: No more endless scrolling or re-reading paragraphs to find what you need.
en.pricing.feat1.l2: Get insights from a 300-page report in minutes instead of hours.
en.pricing.feat2.title: Read Smarter
en.pricing.feat2.l1: Reading isn't just about speed; it's about understanding and retaining more.
en.pricing.feat2.l2: Walk away with deeper comprehension and smarter insights without mental fatigue.
en.pricing.feat3.title: Ask Questions
en.pricing.feat3.l1: Turn passive reading into an active conversation.
en.pricing.feat3.l2: Upload your PDF, book, or report and simply ask anything.
en.pricing.feat4.title: Be Productive
en.pricing.feat4.l1: Productivity isn't just doing more — it's achieving more with less effort.
en.pricing.feat4.l2: Students finish faster. Professionals prepare in minutes. Researchers stay ahead.
en.features.title: How to Use MyReader AI (Chat with Files and More)
en.features.step1.title: Sign Up for an Account
en.features.step1.l1: Visit the official website at myreader.ai.
en.features.step1.l2: Click "Try for free" to create an account using your email or other quick methods.
en.features.step1.l3: Free trials are available, with paid plans for more features like unlimited uploads.
en.features.step2.title: Upload Your Files
en.features.step2.l1: Select a single document, a collection, or your entire library from the sidebar.
en.features.step2.l2: Start typing questions in the chat interface, like "Summarize chapter 3".
en.features.step2.l3: The AI provides instant answers with in-line citations linking back to exact pages.
en.features.step2.l4: Chat across multiple books at once for comparative insights.
en.features.step3.title: Chat with Your Documents
en.features.step3.l1: Once logged in, go to your library or the upload section.
en.features.step3.l2: Drag and drop or select files: PDFs, EPUBs, Word docs, PowerPoint, web links, or YouTube videos.
en.features.step3.l3: Upload up to 20,000 pages total. Files are stored securely and kept private.
en.features.step3.l4: Tip: Organize uploads into collections for easier access later.
en.services.title: MyReader AI reading from 5,000+ Documents
en.services.reviews.title: Once you try it, you can't go back
en.services.noReviews: No reviews yet. Be the first to share your experience!
en.services.formats.title: Works with any Documents:
en.account.choosePlan: Choose a plan to upgrade your account:
en.account.stripeNote: Paid plans open secure Stripe checkout and return here with confirmation.
en.account.noReviews: You have not submitted any reviews yet.
en.tour.pricing.plans.title: Compare plans
en.tour.pricing.plans.description: This page shows all available plans. Compare features and pick the one that fits your needs.
en.tour.pricing.free.title: Free plan
en.tour.pricing.free.description: Start for free with 5 queries per day and files up to 10 MB. No credit card needed.
en.tour.pricing.starter.title: Starter plan
en.tour.pricing.starter.description: Upgrade to Starter for up to 20,000 pages, advanced analysis, and citations.
en.tour.pricing.enterprise.title: Enterprise plan
en.tour.pricing.enterprise.description: Enterprise gives you unlimited scale, team seats, custom integrations, and dedicated support.
en.tour.pricing.features.title: Why upgrade?
en.tour.pricing.features.description: These four benefits explain the value of upgrading: save time, read smarter, ask questions, and be more productive.
en.tour.services.docs.title: Document services
en.tour.services.docs.description: MyReader processes thousands of documents across many formats so you can chat with any of them.
en.tour.services.formats.title: Supported formats
en.tour.services.formats.description: PDF, Word, Web, PPT, Excel, Images, and Screenshots are all supported for upload and chat.
en.tour.services.reviews.title: User reviews
en.tour.services.reviews.description: See what real users say about MyReader after using it for research, work, and study.
en.tour.services.gallery.title: Gallery
en.tour.services.gallery.description: A visual showcase of MyReader in action across different document types and use cases.
en.tour.features.intro.title: How it works
en.tour.features.intro.description: This page walks you through the three steps to get started: sign up, upload files, and chat.
en.tour.features.step1.title: Step 1 — Sign up
en.tour.features.step1.description: Create your free account in seconds. No credit card required to start.
en.tour.features.step2.title: Step 2 — Upload
en.tour.features.step2.description: See how the upload and chat interface looks before you try it yourself.
en.tour.account.nav.title: Account navigation
en.tour.account.nav.description: Use the left menu to switch between Profile, Subscription, Reviews, and Billing sections.
en.tour.account.profile.title: Edit your profile
en.tour.account.profile.description: Update your name, email, and profile photo here.
en.tour.account.password.title: Change password
en.tour.account.password.description: Set a new password for your account from this section.
en.tour.account.subscription.title: Your subscription
en.tour.account.subscription.description: View your current plan and upgrade to Premium or Enterprise directly from here.
en.rag.noDocuments: I couldn't find any uploaded document content to answer "{{question}}".
en.rag.noSupportedAnswer: I couldn't find a supported answer to "{{question}}" in the uploaded document(s).
en.rag.answerIntro: Answer based only on the uploaded document(s) for "{{question}}":
en.chat.ragFailure: RAG search failed. Please try again or re-upload your document.

am.auth.name: ስም
am.overview.heroTitle: ማንኛውንም ፋይል ይጫኑ፣ MyReader ጥያቄዎችዎን በጥቂት ሰከንዶች ውስጥ ይመልሳል
am.overview.howItWorksTitle: MyReader AIን እንዴት እንደሚጠቀሙ (ከፋይሎች ጋር ቻት)
am.overview.ctaText: ጊዜዎን ለማዳን እና በብልህ ሁኔታ ለማንበብ ዝግጁ ነዎት? ዛሬ በነጻ ይመዝገቡ።
am.overview.form.name: ሙሉ ስም
am.dashboard.noReviews: እስካሁን ግምገማ የለም። MyReaderን መጠቀም ሲጀምሩ እንቅስቃሴዎ እዚህ ይታያል።
am.dashboard.noChats: እስካሁን ቻት የለም። ከ Chat ገጽ አዲስ ቻት ይጀምሩ።
am.chat.welcomeText: አዲስ ቻት ለመጀመር ፋይል ይጫኑ። MyReader ሰነዶችን ያቀናብራል እና ይዘታቸውን እንዲመረምሩ ይረዳዎታል።
am.chat.uploadHint: ፋይልዎን ይጎትቱ ወይም ለመምረጥ ጠቅ ያድርጉ
am.chat.folderUploadHint: የ Enterprise ተጠቃሚዎች የአካባቢ ፎልደር ጭነት ማድረግ እና በውስጡ ባሉ ሰነዶች ላይ መጠየቅ ይችላሉ።
am.chat.folderUpgradeHint: ፎልደሮችን ለመጫን እና በቡድን ሰነዶች ላይ ለመቻት ወደ Enterprise ያሻሽሉ።
am.chat.composerNote: መልሶች በተጫነው ሰነድ ላይ ብቻ ይመሰረታሉ።
am.chat.composerNoteFolder: መልሶች በተመረጠው ፎልደር ውስጥ ባሉ ሰነዶች ላይ ብቻ ይመሰረታሉ።
am.chat.currentScopeEmpty: የአሁኑን ሰነድ ወይም ፎልደር ዝርዝር ለማየት ቻት ይክፈቱ።
am.chat.processedFileIntro: "{{fileName}}" የተባለውን ፋይል አቀናብሬዋለሁ። ምን ማወቅ ይፈልጋሉ?
am.chat.processedFolderIntro: "{{folderName}}" ፎልደር ዝግጁ ነው። ጥያቄዎችን ይጠይቁ እና እኔ ከዚህ ፎልደር ሰነዶች ብቻ እመልሳለሁ።
am.chat.previousUploadIntro: ከዚህ በፊት "{{fileName}}" የተባለ ፋይል ጭነው ነበር።
am.chat.previousFolderIntro: ከዚህ በፊት "{{folderName}}" ፎልደር ጭነው ነበር። በቀኝ በኩል ያለውን ዝርዝር በመክፈት ውስጡን ይመልከቱ።
am.chat.uploadWarning: ፋይሉ ተጫኗል፣ ነገር ግን የ RAG ሂደቱ ሙሉ በሙሉ አልተጠናቀቀም።
am.chat.uploadFailed: የፋይል ጭነት አልተሳካም። እባክዎ እንደገና ይሞክሩ።
am.chat.folderUploadFailed: የፎልደር ጭነት አልተሳካም። እባክዎ እንደገና ይሞክሩ ወይም ትንሽ ፋይሎችን ይምረጡ።
am.chat.folderUploadPartial: ፎልደሩ ተጭኗል፣ ከ {{total}} ፋይሎች {{ready}} ብቻ ለቻት ዝግጁ ናቸው።
am.chat.folderUploadNoReady: የፎልደሩ ጭነት ተጠናቋል፣ ነገር ግን ለቻት ዝግጁ የሆነ ፋይል የለም።
am.chat.folderEnterpriseOnly: የፎልደር ጭነት በ Enterprise ፕላን ብቻ ይገኛል።
am.chat.settingsAlert: ገጽታ ወይም ቋንቋ ለመቀየር የላይኛውን መቆጣጠሪያ ይጠቀሙ።
am.chat.helpAlert: የእርምጃ መመሪያውን በመጠቀም ፋይል ይጫኑ፣ ቻት ይክፈቱ እና ጥያቄዎችን ይጠይቁ።
am.sentbot.title: ሴንትቦት
am.sentbot.intro.line2: ስለ ድጋፍ፣ አጠቃቀም፣ ዳሽቦርድ ቁጥሮች፣ ምዝገባ እና ክፍያ ልረዳዎ እችላለሁ።
am.sentbot.intro.line3: ስለ ሰነድ ይዘት ጥያቄዎች እባክዎ Chat ገጽን ይጠቀሙ።
am.sentbot.placeholder: ስለ አጠቃቀም፣ ፕላኖች፣ ክፍያ ወይም ዳሽቦርድ መረጃ ይጠይቁ...
am.tour.common.controls.title: የስራ ቦታ መቆጣጠሪያዎች
am.tour.common.controls.description: ቋንቋን ለመቀየር፣ ገጽታን ለመቀየር እና መመሪያውን ለመድገም እነዚህን ይጠቀሙ።
am.tour.overview.hero.title: ከመግባትዎ በፊት ከዚህ ይጀምሩ
am.tour.overview.hero.description: የመነሻ ገጹ ለአዲስ ጎብኚዎች የመጀመሪያ እርምጃን ያሳያል።
am.tour.overview.how.title: የእርምጃ ፍሰቱን ይመልከቱ
am.tour.overview.how.description: ይህ ክፍል መመዝገብ፣ ሰነዶችን መጫን እና ከእነሱ ጋር መቻት እንዴት እንደሚሆን ያሳያል።
am.tour.overview.pricing.title: ፕላኖችን ያረጋግጡ
am.tour.overview.pricing.description: Free፣ Premium እና Enterprise ፕላኖችን ያነፃፅሩ።
am.tour.overview.cta.title: መለያዎን ይፍጠሩ
am.tour.overview.cta.description: ከመመልከት ወደ መጫን እና መቻት ለመግባት ይህ ፈጣኑ መንገድ ነው።
am.tour.login.form.title: ለመቀጠል ይግቡ
am.tour.login.form.description: የግል ዳሽቦርድዎን እና የቻት የስራ ቦታዎን ለመክፈት ኢሜይልና የይለፍ ቃል ያስገቡ።
am.tour.login.alt.title: መጀመሪያ መለያ ያስፈልጋል?
am.tour.login.alt.description: መለያ ካልፈጠሩ በታች ያለውን የምዝገባ አገናኝ ይጠቀሙ።
am.tour.signup.form.title: መለያዎን ይፍጠሩ
am.tour.signup.form.description: ፋይሎችን ለመጫን እና RAG ቻት ለመጠቀም መረጃዎን እዚህ ያስገቡ።

am.tour.signup.alt.description: ከዚህ አገናኝ በመጠቀም ወደ መግቢያ ገጹ ይመለሱ።

am.tour.chat.composer.title: በምንጭ የተመሠረቱ ጥያቄዎችን ይጠይቁ

am.tour.chat.history.title: ጭነትን እና ርዕሶችን ይመልከቱ
am.tour.chat.history.description: በቀኝ በኩል ያለው ክፍል የጭነት ታሪክን፣ ርዕሶችን እና የሰነድ ዝርዝርን ያያያዛል።
am.tour.chat.sentbot.title: የSentbot ድጋፍን ክፈት
am.tour.chat.sentbot.description: Sentbot በአጠቃቀም፣ ክፍያ እና ፕላን ጥያቄዎች ይረዳል። ለሰነድ ይዘት ጥያቄዎች Chat ገጹ ላይ ይቆዩ።
am.pricing.title: ጊዜዎን ሳያጠፉ በብልህ ሁኔታ ያንብቡ
am.pricing.free.name: ነጻ
am.pricing.starter.name: ስታርተር
am.pricing.enterprise.name: ኢንተርፕራይዝ
am.pricing.details: ሁሉም ፕላኖች ፈጣን፣ ደህንነቱ የተጠበቀ እና ማስታወቂያ-ነጻ ናቸው። በማንኛውም ጊዜ ይሰርዙ።
am.pricing.stripeNote: የሚከፈሉ ምዝገባዎች በ Stripe ቼክአውት ደህንነቱ በተጠበቀ ሁኔታ ይካሄዳሉ።
am.pricing.feat1.title: ጊዜዎን ይቆጥቡ!
am.pricing.feat1.l1: ምን እንደሚፈልጉ ለማግኘት ማለቂያ የሌለው ማሸብለል አያስፈልግም።
am.pricing.feat1.l2: ከ300 ገጽ ሪፖርት ግንዛቤ ከሰዓታት ይልቅ በደቂቃዎች ያግኙ።
am.pricing.feat2.title: በብልህ ሁኔታ ያንብቡ
am.pricing.feat2.l1: ማንበብ ስለ ፍጥነት ብቻ አይደለም፤ ስለ መረዳት እና ማስታወስ ነው።
am.pricing.feat2.l2: ጥልቅ ግንዛቤ እና ብልህ ግንዛቤ ያለ አእምሮ ድካም ያግኙ።
am.pricing.feat3.title: ጥያቄዎችን ይጠይቁ
am.pricing.feat3.l1: ተገብሮ ማንበብን ወደ ንቁ ውይይት ይቀይሩ።
am.pricing.feat3.l2: PDF፣ መጽሐፍ ወይም ሪፖርት ጭነው ማንኛውንም ይጠይቁ።
am.pricing.feat4.title: ምርታማ ይሁኑ
am.pricing.feat4.l1: ምርታማነት ብዙ ማድረግ ብቻ አይደለም — ያነሰ ጥረት ብዙ ማሳካት ነው።
am.pricing.feat4.l2: ተማሪዎች ፈጥነው ይጨርሳሉ። ባለሙያዎች በደቂቃዎች ይዘጋጃሉ።
am.features.title: MyReader AIን እንዴት እንደሚጠቀሙ (ከፋይሎች ጋር ቻት)
am.features.step1.title: መለያ ይፍጠሩ
am.features.step1.l2: ኢሜይልዎን ወይም ሌሎች ፈጣን ዘዴዎችን በመጠቀም መለያ ለመፍጠር "ነጻ ሞክር" ጠቅ ያድርጉ።
am.features.step1.l3: ነጻ ሙከራዎች ይገኛሉ፣ ለተጨማሪ ባህሪያት የሚከፈሉ ፕላኖች አሉ።
am.features.step2.title: ፋይሎችዎን ይጫኑ
am.features.step2.l1: ነጠላ ሰነድ፣ ስብስብ ወይም ሙሉ ቤተ-መጻሕፍትዎን ከጎን አሞሌ ይምረጡ።
am.features.step2.l2: እንደ "ምዕራፍ 3ን ጠቅለል አድርግ" ያሉ ጥያቄዎችን ይጻፉ።
am.features.step2.l3: AI ወዲያውኑ ወደ ትክክለኛ ገጾች የሚያገናኙ ጥቅሶች ያለው መልስ ይሰጣል።
am.features.step2.l4: ለንጽጽር ግንዛቤ በብዙ መጻሕፍት ላይ በአንድ ጊዜ ቻት ያድርጉ።
am.features.step3.title: ከሰነዶችዎ ጋር ቻት ያድርጉ
am.features.step3.l1: ከገቡ በኋላ ወደ ቤተ-መጻሕፍትዎ ወይም የጭነት ክፍሉ ይሂዱ።
am.features.step3.l2: ፋይሎችን ይጎትቱ ወይም ይምረጡ: PDFs፣ EPUBs፣ Word ሰነዶች፣ PowerPoint፣ የድር አገናኞች።
am.features.step3.l3: እስከ 20,000 ገጾች ይጫኑ። ፋይሎች ደህንነቱ በተጠበቀ ሁኔታ ይቀመጣሉ።
am.features.step3.l4: ጠቃሚ ምክር: ጭነቶችን ወደ ስብስቦች ያደራጁ።
am.services.title: MyReader AI ከ5,000+ ሰነዶች ያነባል
am.services.reviews.title: አንዴ ከሞከሩ ወደ ኋላ አይመለሱም
am.services.noReviews: እስካሁን ምንም ግምገማ የለም። የመጀመሪያው ይሁኑ!
am.services.formats.title: ከማንኛውም ሰነድ ጋር ይሰራል:
am.account.stripeNote: የሚከፈሉ ፕላኖች ደህንነቱ የተጠበቀ Stripe ቼክአውት ይከፍታሉ።
am.tour.pricing.plans.title: ፕላኖችን ያወዳድሩ
am.tour.pricing.plans.description: ይህ ገጽ ሁሉንም ፕላኖች ያሳያል። ባህሪያቱን ያወዳድሩ እና ለፍላጎትዎ የሚስማማውን ይምረጡ።
am.tour.pricing.free.title: ነጻ ፕላን
am.tour.pricing.free.description: በቀን 5 ጥያቄዎች እና እስከ 10 MB ፋይሎች ነጻ ይጀምሩ። ክሬዲት ካርድ አያስፈልግም።
am.tour.pricing.starter.title: ስታርተር ፕላን
am.tour.pricing.starter.description: እስከ 20,000 ገጾች፣ የላቀ ትንታኔ እና ጥቅሶች ለማግኘት ወደ ስታርተር ያሻሽሉ።
am.tour.pricing.enterprise.title: ኢንተርፕራይዝ ፕላን
am.tour.pricing.enterprise.description: ኢንተርፕራይዝ ያልተገደበ ልኬት፣ የቡድን መቀመጫዎች እና ልዩ ድጋፍ ይሰጣል።
am.tour.pricing.features.title: ለምን ያሻሽሉ?
am.tour.pricing.features.description: እነዚህ አራት ጥቅሞች የማሻሻሉን ዋጋ ያብራራሉ: ጊዜ ቆጥቡ፣ ብልህ ሁኑ፣ ይጠይቁ፣ ምርታማ ይሁኑ።
am.tour.services.docs.title: የሰነድ አገልግሎቶች
am.tour.services.docs.description: MyReader በብዙ ቅርጸቶች ሺዎች ሰነዶችን ያቀናብራል።
am.tour.services.formats.title: የሚደገፉ ቅርጸቶች
am.tour.services.formats.description: PDF፣ Word፣ Web፣ PPT፣ Excel፣ ምስሎች እና ቅጽበታዊ ገጽ ዕይታዎች ሁሉም ይደገፋሉ።
am.tour.services.reviews.title: የተጠቃሚ ግምገማዎች
am.tour.services.reviews.description: ለምርምር፣ ስራ እና ጥናት MyReaderን ከተጠቀሙ በኋላ ተጠቃሚዎች ምን እንደሚሉ ይመልከቱ።
am.tour.services.gallery.title: ጋለሪ
am.tour.services.gallery.description: MyReader በተለያዩ ሰነድ ዓይነቶች ላይ ሲሰራ የሚያሳይ ምስላዊ ማሳያ።
am.tour.features.intro.title: እንዴት እንደሚሰራ
am.tour.features.intro.description: ይህ ገጽ ለመጀመር ሶስቱን እርምጃዎች ያሳያል: ይመዝገቡ፣ ፋይሎችን ይጫኑ፣ ቻት ያድርጉ።
am.tour.features.step1.title: እርምጃ 1 — ይመዝገቡ
am.tour.features.step1.description: ነጻ መለያዎን በጥቂት ሰከንዶች ይፍጠሩ። ለመጀመር ክሬዲት ካርድ አያስፈልግም።
am.tour.features.step2.title: እርምጃ 2 — ይጫኑ
am.tour.features.step2.description: ራስዎ ከመሞከርዎ በፊት የጭነት እና ቻት ገጽ ምን እንደሚመስል ይመልከቱ።
am.tour.account.nav.title: የመለያ ናቪጌሽን
am.tour.account.nav.description: ፕሮፋይል፣ ምዝገባ፣ ግምገማዎች እና ክፍያ ክፍሎች መካከል ለመቀያየር የግራ ምናሌን ይጠቀሙ።
am.tour.account.profile.title: ፕሮፋይልዎን ያርትዑ
am.tour.account.profile.description: ስምዎን፣ ኢሜይልዎን እና የፕሮፋይል ፎቶዎን እዚህ ያዘምኑ።
am.tour.account.password.title: የይለፍ ቃል ይቀይሩ
am.tour.account.password.description: ለመለያዎ አዲስ የይለፍ ቃል ከዚህ ክፍል ያዘጋጁ።
am.tour.account.subscription.title: ምዝገባዎ
am.tour.account.subscription.description: የአሁኑን ፕላን ይመልከቱ እና ወደ ፕሪሚየም ወይም ኢንተርፕራይዝ ቀጥታ ከዚህ ያሻሽሉ።
am.rag.noDocuments: "{{question}}" ለሚለው ጥያቄ የሚያገለግል የተሰቀለ ሰነድ ይዘት አላገኘሁም።
am.rag.noSupportedAnswer: በተሰቀሉት ሰነዶች ውስጥ "{{question}}" የሚደግፍ መልስ አላገኘሁም።
am.rag.answerIntro: "{{question}}" ለሚለው ጥያቄ ከተሰቀሉት ሰነዶች ብቻ የተመሠረተ መልስ፦
am.chat.ragFailure: የ RAG ፍለጋ አልተሳካም። እባክዎ እንደገና ይሞክሩ ወይም ሰነዱን እንደገና ይስቀሉ።
